column1: # description: Benchmark performance scores for major LLMs across standardized evaluations
# notes: Updated to 2026 model landscape. MMLU scores from official papers
column3: and llm-stats.com. MMMLU (multilingual MMLU) used where standard MMLU unavailable for newer models. HumanEval from official papers and leaderboards. MATH-500 from Vellum. GPQA Diamond from Vellum and official sources. Chatbot Arena Elo from arena.ai (March 2026 snapshot). Some older benchmarks (HellaSwag
column4: ARC) deprecated in favor of GPQA Diamond. N/A = not publicly available.
